# GitFlowPro AI Context

## Project Name
GitFlowPro

## Purpose
GitFlowPro is an enterprise-grade GitHub automation and intelligence toolkit designed to improve repository health, CI/CD reliability, security posture, and developer productivity across single or multi-repository environments.

## Engineering Principles
- Security-first design
- Least privilege permissions in workflows
- Fail-safe automation: never block development due to external API downtime
- Deterministic output whenever possible
- Clear logs and explainable automation decisions
